# Ocean Endodontics

> Board-certified endodontist Dr. Kelly Kimiko Leong provides gentle, microscope-guided root canal therapy, retreatment, apicoectomy microsurgery, cracked-tooth and dental-trauma care, same-day emergency treatment, sedation, and internal bleaching in San Francisco, California. The practice serves the city's west side and nearby Daly City.

## Practice facts

- Name: Ocean Endodontics (The Dental Group of Dr. Kelly Kimiko Leong)
- Provider: Dr. Kelly Kimiko Leong, DMD — board-certified endodontist, Diplomate of the American Board of Endodontics (2017)
- Address: 2645 Ocean Ave, Ste 203, San Francisco, CA 94132
- Phone: (415) 741-3636
- Email: info@oceanendosf.com
- Hours: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Friday 8:30 AM–5:00 PM; closed Thursday, Saturday, and Sunday
- Parking: free lot through the building breezeway plus street parking; strong transit access
- Booking: https://oceanendosf.com/book-appointment (no dentist referral required)

## Services

- [Root Canal Therapy](https://oceanendosf.com/services/root-canal-therapy): Save a natural tooth by removing infected pulp and sealing the canals under magnification.
- [Root Canal Retreatment](https://oceanendosf.com/services/retreatment-root-canal-therapy): A second chance for a previously treated tooth that has become symptomatic.
- [Apicoectomy / Endodontic Microsurgery](https://oceanendosf.com/services/apicoectomy-endodontic-microsurgery): Microsurgery that removes infection at the root tip to save a tooth.
- [Diagnosis & Pain Management](https://oceanendosf.com/services/diagnosis-pain-management): Pinpointing the true source of tooth pain with testing and 3D imaging.
- [Cracked Tooth Treatment](https://oceanendosf.com/services/cracked-tooth-treatment): Diagnosis and treatment of cracked or fractured teeth.
- [Emergency Endodontic Treatment](https://oceanendosf.com/services/emergency-endodontic-treatment): Same-day care for severe tooth pain and swelling when possible.
- [Dental Trauma Management](https://oceanendosf.com/services/dental-trauma-management): Urgent care for chipped, displaced, and knocked-out teeth.
- [Nitrous Oxide Sedation](https://oceanendosf.com/services/nitrous-oxide-sedation): Light "laughing gas" sedation to ease dental anxiety.
- [Oral Conscious Sedation](https://oceanendosf.com/services/oral-conscious-sedation-dentistry): Deeper relaxation for appropriate, screened patients.
- [Internal Bleaching](https://oceanendosf.com/services/internal-bleaching): Whitening a single darkened tooth from the inside after a root canal.
- [Botox for Bruxism](https://oceanendosf.com/services/botox-for-bruxism): Therapeutic Botox to relax overactive jaw muscles from grinding and clenching.

Note: In-office comfort is limited to nitrous oxide and oral conscious sedation. The practice does not provide IV sedation or general anesthesia.

## Areas served

- [Ingleside](https://oceanendosf.com/areas-we-serve/ingleside)
- [Lake Merced](https://oceanendosf.com/areas-we-serve/lake-merced)
- [Parkmerced](https://oceanendosf.com/areas-we-serve/parkmerced)
- [West Portal](https://oceanendosf.com/areas-we-serve/west-portal)
- [St. Francis Wood](https://oceanendosf.com/areas-we-serve/st-francis-wood)
- [Balboa Terrace](https://oceanendosf.com/areas-we-serve/balboa-terrace)
- [Daly City](https://oceanendosf.com/areas-we-serve/daly-city)

## Important

This site is for general education and is not a substitute for professional dental advice. For a life-threatening emergency, difficulty breathing or swallowing, uncontrolled bleeding, or rapidly spreading facial swelling, call 911.
